allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,re; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); m=re.search\(r'Assets:\\s*\\s*]*>\\s*\(.*?\)', html, re.I\); print\(m.group\(1\) if m else 'NOT FOUND'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['full_name'], i['html_url']\) for i in r.get\('items',[]\)[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(i['name'], i.get\('type'\)\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['name']\) for i in d[:20]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(i['name']\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['html_url']\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\)[:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c 'import urllib.parse; print\(urllib.parse.quote\('\\''File:Indian Election Symbol Battery-Torch.png|File:SUCI flag.svg|File:Indian Election Symbol Bat.png|File:Indian Election Symbol Kite.svg|File:Indian Election Symbol Whistle.png|File:Saw election symbol.png'\\''\)\)')

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) text = data.get\('parse', {}\).get\('wikitext', {}\).get\('*', ''\) lines = text.split\('\\n'\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): if any\(x in line for x in ['SUCI', 'Amra_Bangalee', 'Amra Bangalee', 'Kamatapur', 'KPP', 'RSMP', 'Swaraj', 'Rashtriya Secular', 'Majlis']\): start = max\(0, i-2\) end = min\(len\(lines\), i+4\) for j in range\(start, end\): print\(f'Line {j}: {lines[j]}'\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) text = data.get\('parse', {}\).get\('wikitext', {}\).get\('*', ''\) searches = ['Kamatapur', 'KPP', 'Amra Bangalee', 'Swaraj India', 'RSMP', 'Rashtriya Secular'] for s in searches: idx = text.find\(s\) if idx != -1: print\(f'Found {s!r} at index {idx}'\) print\(text[max\(0,idx-200\):idx+400]\) print\('==='\) else: print\(f'NOT FOUND: {s!r}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) text = data.get\('parse', {}\).get\('wikitext', {}\).get\('*', ''\)\) print\(text[:3000]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys html = sys.stdin.read\(\) print\(html[:2000]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) els=d.get\('elements',[]\) print\('Total relations:', len\(els\)\) for e in els[:5]: t=e.get\('tags',{}\) print\(t.get\('name','?'\), '|', t.get\('name:en',''\), '|', t.get\('ref',''\)\) ")
